name: pxf
description: Schema-aware authoring of PXF (Proto eXpressive Format) files via the protolsp Language Server: syntax highlighting, parse + schema diagnostics, hover.

protolsp.path.description: Path to the protolsp binary. Leave empty to find it on PATH (also honors the PROTOLSP_PATH environment variable). Override per-workspace when running against a development build.

protolsp.logLevel.description: Log level passed to protolsp. Leave empty to use the server's default (info).

protolsp.registry.address.description: gRPC address of the protoregistry server (e.g. 'registry.example.com:443'). Leave empty to disable schema-aware diagnostics — protolsp will then only report parse errors.

protolsp.registry.namespace.description: Primary namespace for this workspace. protolsp uses GetNamespaceChain to discover and consult ancestor namespaces automatically; do not list them here.

protolsp.registry.token.description: Bearer token for protoregistry authentication. Production deployments should use a secret manager or an OIDC flow — storing the literal token in settings is a development convenience only.

scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package --out dist/
